---
title: "settlement_experiment"
author: Tyler Busby
format: html
---

### Randomly generating where our rock and shells will be in the cage

The numbers are placed in a random order, with the first 3 numbers referring to the left top, left middle, then left bottom, and the last 2 numbers being the right top, and right bottom.

* 1 means rock 
* 2 means mussel shell
* 3 means limpet shell
* 4 means tegula shell
* 5 means nucella shell

```{r}
# creates 10 random orders by setting a seed then printing the results of the random sample without replacement
for (i in 1:10) {
  set.seed(i)
  print(sample(1:5, 5, replace = F))}
```
